summary: First-finish smoke test of Gym Progress Tracker passed end-to-end. Backend auth, exercises, workouts, body-weight, stats endpoints respond correctly. Frontend full flow (register, login, create exercise, log+complete workout, log body weight, dashboard aggregation, history, calendar, analytics, settings unit switch, logout, protected route) all verified.
passed: POST /api/auth/login (admin & test user) returns JWT token + user payload
GET /api/auth/me returns current user; reflects unit preference
POST /api/exercises creates custom exercise; GET /api/exercises lists it
PATCH /api/auth/units persists units=lbs (verified via /auth/me after UI save)
Frontend /register -> creates user and redirects to dashboard (screenshot confirmed)
Frontend /login with test@gymtracker.com -> lands on dashboard
/exercises: create custom exercise 'T1Bench' visible in list
/body-weight: add 76.3 entry visible in list and reflected on dashboard (Body Weight 76.3 kg)
/log: create workout 'T1 Push Day', pick exercise from picker, fill set weight/reps, save -> navigates to /log/:id
/log/:id: 'Complete' button completes workout; dashboard shows Total Workouts=1, Streak=1d, PRs=T1Bench 60kg x 8 (76 1RM), Recent contains 'T1 Push Day'
/calendar and /analytics pages render without runtime errors
/settings: switch to lbs and save -> persisted on backend (verified via /auth/me returning units=lbs)
Logout clears session and redirects to /login
Protected route /dashboard redirects to /login when logged out
action_items: Minor (non-blocking): /api/stats/summary does not exist; backend exposes /api/stats/dashboard, /streak, /muscle-groups, /strength-progression. Update problem statement reference if needed; no code change required.
Minor (non-blocking): In Settings, radio uses Radix attribute data-state but visual selection state could not be probed via plain checked attribute; backend persistence confirmed.
